title: How to setup and use Claude Code for FREE  (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: A tutorial on setting up and using Claude Code with Ollama to build agentic AI applications locally without paid APIs. The guide covers installing Ollama, configuring Claude Code with open-source LLMs like Qwen 3.5, and constructing a multi-agent travel booking application with Flask frontend.
